    sum_digits_recursive(N, 0).

sum_digits_recursive(0, Sum) -> Sum;
sum_digits_recursive(N, Sum) ->
    Remainder = N rem 10,
    NewN = N div 10,
    sum_digits_recursive(NewN, Sum + Remainder).

% Helper function to calculate prefix sums of a list (DP array)
% Input list is 0-indexed, representing values 0 to V_MAX
calculate_prefix_sums(DP_prev, V_MAX) ->
    PrefixSums = [0],
    
    % Accumulate prefix sums
    prefix_sums_helper(DP_prev, V_MAX, 0, [0]).

% prefix_sums_helper(DP_prev, Current_V, Current_Sum, Acc)
prefix_sums_helper(_, 0, _, Acc) -> reverse(Acc);
prefix_sums_helper(DP_prev, V, Current_Sum, Acc) ->
    % DP_prev is 0-indexed, so we access element V
    DP_V = element(V, DP_prev),
    New_Sum = (Current_Sum + DP_V) rem 1000000007,
    prefix_sums_helper(DP_prev, V - 1, New_Sum, [New_Sum | Acc]).

% Helper to safely retrieve element from a list assuming 0-indexing (slow but necessary for list structure)
element(0, List) -> head(List);
element(N, List) -> element(N-1, tail(List)).

head([H|_]) -> H;
tail([_|T]) -> T;

% Main DP transition step
% next_dp(DP_prev, target_Si, V_MAX)
next_dp(DP_prev, target_Si, V_MAX) ->
    % 1. Calculate Prefix Sums
    PrefixSums = calculate_prefix_sums(DP_prev, V_MAX),
    
    % 2. Calculate DP_curr
    DP_curr = [0 | dp_curr_helper(DP_prev, PrefixSums, target_Si, V_MAX, 1, [0])].

% dp_curr_helper(DP_prev, PrefixSums, target_Si, V_MAX, Current_V, Acc)
dp_curr_helper(_, _, _, V_MAX, Current_V, Acc) when Current_V > V_MAX -> 
    reverse(Acc);

dp_curr_helper(DP_prev, PrefixSums, target_Si, V_MAX, Current_V, Acc) ->
    % Current_V corresponds to index Current_V
    
    % Check if sumDigits(Current_V) matches target_Si
    Digitsum = sum_digits(Current_V),
    
    DP_V = if Digitum == target_Si -> 
            % DP_curr[v] = PrefixSum[v]
            element(Current_V, PrefixSums)
        ;
            0
        end,
        
    dp_curr_helper(DP_prev, PrefixSums, target_Si, V_MAX, Current_V + 1, [DP_V | Acc]).


solve(digitSum) ->
    V_MAX = 5000,
    MOD = 1000000007,
    N = length(digitSum),
    
    % --- Step 1: Initialization (i = 0) ---
    TargetS0 = element(0, digitSum),
    DP_initial = [0 | dp_initial_helper(TargetS0, V_MAX, 1, [0])].

dp_initial_helper(TargetS0, V_MAX, Current_V, Acc) when Current_V > V_MAX -> 
    reverse(Acc);
dp_initial_helper(TargetS0, V_MAX, Current_V, Acc) ->

    DP_V = if Digitum == TargetS0 -> 1 else 0 end,
    dp_initial_helper(TargetS0, V_MAX, Current_V + 1, [DP_V | Acc]).


    % --- Step 2: DP Transitions (i = 1 to N-1) ---
    DP_final = dp_transitions(digitSum, 1, DP_initial, V_MAX, MOD).
    
    % --- Step 3: Final Result ---
    % Sum all elements of DP_final modulo MOD
    total_count = lists:sum(DP_final) rem MOD,
    total_count.

% dp_transitions(DigitSum_List, Current_Index, DP_Prev, V_MAX, MOD)
dp_transitions(_, Current_Index, DP_Prev, _V_MAX, _MOD) when Current_Index >= N ->
    DP_Prev;
dp_transitions(DigitSum_List, Current_Index, DP_Prev, V_MAX, MOD) ->
    TargetSi = element(Current_Index, DigitSum_List),
    DP_Curr = next_dp(DP_Prev, TargetSi, V_MAX),
    dp_transitions(DigitSum_List, Current_Index + 1, DP_Curr, V_MAX, MOD).

    sum_digits(N) when N >= 0 ->
        case N of
            0 -> 0;
            _ -> sum_digits_loop(N, 0)
        end.

    sum_digits_loop(N, Acc) when N > 0 ->
        sum_digits_loop(N div 10, Acc + (N rem 10));
    sum_digits_loop(_, Acc) ->
        Acc.

    N_length = length(digitSum),
    V_MAX = 5000,

    %% --- Step 1: Initialization (i = 0) ---
    targetS0 = hd(digitSum),
    initial_dp = list_to_list(V_MAX + 1, fun(V) ->
        if sum_digits(V) == targetS0 -> 1;
        true -> 0
        end
    end),

    %% --- Step 2: DP Transitions (i = 1 to N-1) ---
    dp_final = foldl(fun(dp_prev, i) ->
        targetSi = list_element(i, digitSum),

        %% prefixSum[v] = sum(dp_prev[u] for u <= v) mod MOD
        prefixSum = [0 | prefix_sum_loop(dp_prev, 0, 0)],

        prefix_sum_loop(List, Index, CurrentSum) when Index > V_MAX ->
            List;
        prefix_sum_loop(List, Index, CurrentSum) ->
            NewSum = (CurrentSum + list_element(Index, List)) rem MOD,
            prefix_sum_loop(List, Index + 1, NewSum)
        end,

        %% b. Calculate DP_curr
        dp_curr = [0 | curr_dp_loop(V_MAX, 0, prefixSum, targetSi)],

        curr_dp_loop(MaxV, V, PrefixSum, TargetSi) when V > MaxV ->
            [] ;

                [0 | curr_dp_loop(MaxV, V + 1, PrefixSum, TargetSi)]
            end
        end

    totalCount = list_sum(dp_final) rem MOD,

    build_prefix_sum_rec(0, lists:at(DP_prev, 0), Mod, []).

build_prefix_sum_rec(V, CurrentSum, Mod, Accum) when V >= 501 ->
    lists:reverse(Accum);

build_prefix_sum_rec(V, CurrentSum, Mod, Accum) ->
    NextVal = lists:at(DP_prev, V + 1),
    NewSum = (CurrentSum + NextVal) rem Mod,
    build_prefix_sum_rec(V + 1, NewSum, Mod, [NewSum | Accum]).

% Iteratively applies DP transition for steps i=1 to N-1
loop_dp(DigitSum, I, DP_prev, VMax, Mod) when I >= length(DigitSum) ->
    DP_prev;

loop_dp(DigitSum, I, DP_prev, VMax, Mod) ->
    TargetSi = lists:at(DigitSum, I),
    
    % 1. Calculate Prefix Sum P (P[v] = sum(DP_prev[u] for u <= v))
    % PrefixSum will be [P[0], P[1], ..., P[VMax]]
    PrefixSum = [lists:at(DP_prev, 0) | build_prefix_sum_list(DP_prev, Mod)],

    % 2. Calculate DP_curr
    DP_curr = lists:map(fun(V) ->
        if sum_digits(V) == TargetSi ->
            % DP_curr[V] = PrefixSum[V]
            lists:at(PrefixSum, V)
        ;
            0
        end
    end, [0..VMax]),
    
    loop_dp(DigitSum, I + 1, DP_curr, VMax, Mod).

sum_dp_array(DP_array, Mod) ->
    lists:foldl(fun(Acc, Val) -> (Acc + Val) rem Mod end, 0, DP_array).

solve(DigitSum) ->
    VMax = 5000,
    Mod = 1000000007,

    % Step 1: Initialization (i=0)
    TargetS0 = lists:at(DigitSum, 0),
    DP_prev = initialize_dp(VMax, TargetS0, Mod),

    % Step 2: DP Transitions (i=1 to N-1)
    DP_final = loop_dp(DigitSum, 1, DP_prev, VMax, Mod),

    % Step 3: Final Result
    TotalSum = sum_dp_array(DP_final, Mod),
    TotalSum.
